profile_basis: frankenjax-ppad8 was filed after frankenjax-sf71s rejected cyclic-Jacobi row/column micro-tuning. The active hotspot remained the square pseudoinverse benchmark, which computes a Gram matrix and pseudoinverts it through a symmetric cyclic Jacobi eigensolve.

candidate.lever: Route finite square matrices with n >= 32 through a direct one-sided Jacobi SVD pseudoinverse path, forming A+ = V Sigma^-1 U^T from orthogonalized A V columns and avoiding the Gram A^T A path.
candidate.primitive_family: safe-Rust numerical linear algebra / direct one-sided Jacobi SVD
candidate.alien_artifact_family: numerical linear algebra, SVD, matrix methods

baseline_ts1_ms.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-ppad8-baseline rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_192x192_f64 --sample-size 10

unguarded_candidate_ts1_ms.decision: not keepable: sidecar review found missing non-convergence fallback and NaN rcond behavior drift

guarded_candidate_ts1_ms.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-ppad8-candidate-guarded rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_192x192_f64 --sample-size 10
guarded_candidate_ts1_ms.decision: failed real-win gate after proof-safe fallback guard

blockers_found: The unguarded candidate returned a pseudoinverse even after exhausting ONE_SIDED_JACOBI_MAX_SWEEPS; non-converged retained columns are not guaranteed Moore-Penrose.
The unguarded candidate changed rcond = NaN behavior by retaining positive components instead of falling through the existing Gram cutoff behavior.
The initial rank-deficient test only checked A A+ A = A and did not cover A+ A A+ = A+, symmetry of A A+, symmetry of A+ A, or reference equality.

guarded_candidate_tests.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=.rch-target-ppad8-pinv-tests rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv_one_sided -- --nocapture
guarded_candidate_tests.result: passed 3/3 on ts1 after adding finite-rcond guard, retained-column orthogonality fallback, direct-vs-Gram proof, NaN-rcond proof, rank-deficient direct-vs-Gram proof, and Moore-Penrose checks

proof_review.post_rejection_source_check: git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs is empty; production and test source hunk removed

next_primitive.recommendation: Do not continue one-sided Jacobi micro-tuning without a stronger convergence/perf plan. Attack a different primitive: Golub-Kahan bidiagonalization plus QR or divide-and-conquer bidiagonal SVD, with an explicit convergence certificate and fallback before benchmarking.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2x over the current 107.88 ms ts1 baseline for linalg/pinv_192x192_f64

validation.name: focused_guarded_candidate_proof
validation.result: passed 3/3 on RCH ts1 before rejection cleanup
